design_philosophy: Spacious confirmation-gated upload; rich validation feedback for diagnose-and-fix sessions.
strengths: Confirmation step prevents accidental file submissions
Each validation error shown with row, message, and raw payload
Plenty of whitespace, easy to follow what happens next
weaknesses: Slower per upload than a one-click submit
More scrolling on file log and error screens
Less information visible per screen than a dense layout
tradeoffs: Fewer mistakes and clearer recovery paths; a slower pace per upload that experienced daily users may find verbose.
use_when: First-time or occasional uploads, or whenever care matters more than speed.
